description: A woman with long dark hair wearing a turquoise bikini sits on a narrow rocky path along a steep limestone cliff edge overlooking a turquoise sea with gentle waves in a scenic coastal cove. She is positioned with legs extended, feet towards the water, facing away from the camera, her back and side profile visible, towel draped nearby. The cliff features rugged beige limestone formations with caves, sparse green shrubs, dry grasses, wildflowers, and a white shell on the ground. The sea curves around the rocky shoreline below, under a clear bright blue sky with no clouds. The composition captures the dramatic height and natural beauty of the coastal landscape, with sharp sunlight casting shadows on the rocks.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at a rocky coastal cliff overlooking a sea cove in Malta near 36.078689, 14.228403.
time_context: Midday under bright clear blue sky, around 11:47 local time.
